name: poly_bevel_Q1_single_square
description: Polygon Bevel (mesh.bevel, edit-mode Polygons) SQUARE CORNER -- task 0458 Phase 3, finding Q1 (single face, no group). One cube top (+Y) face, inset=0.25, shift=0.15, square=true, group=false, segments=0. Reference topology: 8v/6f -> 20v/14f. Every corner is STANDALONE (no group): the original corner is RETAINED and 2 new split points are inserted on its own two boundary edges (distance=inset from the corner), plus a quad CAP; each boundary edge gets an edge-panel quad; the 4 unselected side faces absorb the 2 splits on their shared edge (quad -> hexagon).
source: Frozen reference-editor capture via the private capture harness's polygon-bevel op (task 0458 Phase 0 dump-oracle poly_bevel_Q1_single_square). Isolates the Square-Corner topology rewrite on a single face with no group interaction at all.

provenance.harness: private capture harness (reference-editor polygon-bevel tool, headless scripted op-dump)
provenance.notes: Phase-0 dump-oracle for square=true (single face). Kernel implemented task 0458 Phase 3 (bevelFacesByMask's square param, source/mesh.d) per the recovered square-cap boundary-mark + rebuild topology rewrite (toolcards/poly.bevel/findings.md section 3).
